title: Behavioral Conflict & Resolution
description: Describe a time you had a major technical disagreement with a team member. What was the engineering core conflict, and how did you resolve it?

title: Python Memory & Architecture Structures
description: Explain Python's Global Interpreter Lock (GIL) and Generational Garbage Collection mechanisms. How do they affect cross-thread scaling?

title: Database Optimization Strategies
description: Explain the difference between clustered and non-clustered indexes. How would you diagnose and optimize a slow-running SQL query?

title: REST vs. GraphQL
description: Compare REST APIs with GraphQL architectures. Under what specific project requirements would you choose one paradigm over the other?
